title: Mistral Family LLM Model Spec
description: Model specification for Mistral-family instruct models. Uses [INST]/[/INST] chat template.
documentation:
## Purpose
Tags a model spec as belonging to the Mistral model family, allowing the runtime to apply the correct `[INST]/[/INST]` chat template and any Mistral-specific inference optimisations automatically.

## When to use
This tag is added by the ValueAdapter when model content inspection identifies a Mistral-family model. Do not set it manually unless you are certain the model uses the Mistral chat template.

## Notes
The tag is backend-agnostic. Mistral-family GGUF models will carry `media:gguf;llm;mistral;model-spec;textable` after full resolution.
